title: ranunculus procurrens
intro: Ranunculus procurrens, also known as creeping buttercup, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Ranunculaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant's health benefits include its ability to aid in digestion and relieve symptoms of fever, as well as its potential to have antimicrobial and antioxidant effects. In herbal preparations, Ranunculus procurrens can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, where it is used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
